chunks.text: Technical Reports - Gerald Friedland. Enhancing GAN-based Vocoders with Contrastive Learning (EECS-2023-183) Haoming Guo, Gerald Friedland and Gopala Krishna Anumanchipalli. Multimodal Contrastive Learning for Unsupervised Video Representation Learning (EECS-2022-206) Anup Hiremath.

On the Robustness of Learned Task Weights in Cross-modal Retrieval (EECS-2020-86) David Nahm.
